title: knn
description: Object representing a k-nearest neighbor search query

field.description: Field to perform the k-nearest neighbor search on

k.description: Deprecated. Use the top-level `limit` parameter instead.

query_vector.description: The vector used as input for the KNN search

doc_id.description: The docuemnt ID used as input for the KNN search

ef.description: Optional parameter controlling the accuracy of the search
